languages.text: "И ты не находишь это омерзительным богохульством? Само ваше сходство — словно плевок на твою веру".

traits.locale_text: "И ты не находишь это омерзительным богохульством? Само ваше сходство — словно плевок на твою веру".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."
languages.original_text: "И ты не находишь это омерзительным богохульством? Само ваше сходство — словно плевок на твою веру".

traits.locale_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

traits.locale_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "Wie kannst du das nicht als abscheuliche Blasphemie betrachten? Allein eure Ähnlichkeit ist ein Spieß auf euren Glauben."
languages.original_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."

languages.text: "Comment ne pas y voir un abominable blasphème ? Votre seule similitude est un crachat sur votre foi".
languages.original_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."

languages.text: "你怎么能不认为这是一种可憎的亵渎？光是你的相似性就是对你信仰的唾弃"。
languages.original_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."

languages.text: "¿Cómo no lo consideras una blasfemia abominable? Tu sola semejanza es un escupitajo sobre tu fe".
languages.original_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."

languages.text: "どうして忌まわしい冒涜だと思わないのか？あなたの類似性だけで、あなたの信仰に唾を吐くようなものだ"
languages.original_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."

languages.text: "Bunu nasıl iğrenç bir küfür olarak görmezsiniz? Sizin benzerliğiniz bile tek başına inancınıza tükürmektir."
languages.original_text: "How do you not consider it an abominable blasphemy? Your similarity alone is a spit on your faith."
